Gregory Hills NSW 2557
Australia

items.label: Weather Comments e.g Hot, Windy, Rain

responses.text:
Today’s works focused on weed control and site maintenance within Zone 2, commencing from the Coral Flame Crescent side. Two team members undertook spot spraying using a Grazon mix, systematically covering the entire slope. To ensure thorough coverage and minimise unnecessary movement across the area, each team member was allocated one half of the slope. This method reduced the risk of missed weeds and improved overall efficiency.
The third team member rotated between the crew throughout the day, carrying out complementary tasks. These included collecting accumulated rubbish along the roadside and conducting hand weeding of moth vine growing within native grasses to prevent further smothering and spread. Additional hand weeding was completed on small African olive seedlings where possible. For olive plants that could not be removed by hand, cutting and painting was undertaken to ensure effective control.
The same work approach and treatment methods were then applied on the opposite side of the riparian zone, ensuring consistency across the site and addressing weed infestations on both banks.
